hero_desc: An intimate oasis in the heart of the city — panoramic garden views, French and Mediterranean inspired cuisine, and genuinely personal service for every occasion. LLLLL change to anything
welcome_title: Where Every Event Becomes a Cherished Memory
welcome_para1: Nestled within the lush surrounds of Veale Gardens, Adelaide Pavilion has been the city's most beloved private function venue since 2003. Once home to the legendary Alpine Restaurant, today it stands as an upscale venue where floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows frame garden views, and every detail is curated for elegance.
welcome_para2: Our team of dedicated coordinators ensure a seamless, personalised experience — whether you're celebrating your wedding day, hosting a corporate gala, or gathering family and friends for a milestone celebration.

testimonials.quote: What a fantastic venue for functions and events! The garden that envelops it is absolutely stunning, further enhancing the charm of the place. We had a corporate event here recently and it was done very well. The food served was amazing. CMS TEST
testimonials.author: Roanna

testimonials.quote: Adelaide Pavilion always go out of their way to ensure that our events are exactly what we hoped for. The staff are really well trained, the food is always delicious and the owners are very friendly. dd
testimonials.author: Tanya M

testimonials.quote: A great venue for a breakfast and workshop meeting. Everything went smoothly from the planning to the execution of the event. Free parking for our guests was a bonus. ddfff
testimonials.author: Julia E
